Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\Python\\DND-like_RPG" && python -c "
from engine.intent_parser import try_parse

entities = {'goblin': {'alive': True}, 'village elder': {'alive': True}}

cases = [
    \('I attack the goblin',            'attack',       False, ''\),
    \('I cast a fireball at the goblin','magic',        True,  'arcana'\),
    \('I sneak past the guard',         'skill_check',  True,  'stealth'\),
    \('I persuade the village elder',   'social',       True,  'persuasion'\),
    \('I talk to the elder',            'social',       False, ''\),
    \('I climb the cliff',              'skill_check',  True,  'athletics'\),
    \('I search the room',              'explore',      False, ''\),
    \('I rest for the night',           'direct_action',False, ''\),
    \('I do something mysterious',      None,           None,  None\),
]

for text, exp_type, exp_roll, exp_skill in cases:
    r = try_parse\(text, entities, 'Normal'\)
    got = \(r['action_type'], r['requires_roll'], r['skill']\) if r else None
    exp = \(exp_type, exp_roll, exp_skill\) if exp_type else None
    status = 'OK' if got == exp else 'FAIL'
    print\(f'{status}  {text!r}'\)
    if status == 'FAIL':
        print\(f'       expected {exp}'\)
        print\(f'       got      {got}'\)
")

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\Python\\DND-like_RPG" && python -c "
from engine.intent_parser import try_parse

entities = {'goblin': {'alive': True}, 'village elder': {'alive': True}}

cases = [
    \('I attack the goblin',             'attack',        False, ''\),
    \('I cast a fireball at the goblin', 'magic',         True,  'arcana'\),
    \('I fire my bow at the goblin',     'attack',        False, ''\),
    \('I sneak past the guard',          'skill_check',   True,  'stealth'\),
    \('I persuade the village elder',    'social',        True,  'persuasion'\),
    \('I talk to the elder',             'social',        False, ''\),
    \('I climb the cliff',               'skill_check',   True,  'athletics'\),
    \('I search the room',               'explore',       False, ''\),
    \('I rest for the night',            'direct_action', False, ''\),
    \('I heal my wounds',                'skill_check',   True,  'medicine'\),
    \('I dodge the incoming arrow',      'skill_check',   True,  'acrobatics'\),
    \('攻擊哥布林',                       'attack',        False, ''\),
    \('我偷偷靠近',                       'skill_check',   True,  'stealth'\),
    \('我說服村長',                       'social',        True,  'persuasion'\),
    \('I do something mysterious',       None,            None,  None\),
]

all_ok = True
for text, exp_type, exp_roll, exp_skill in cases:
    r = try_parse\(text, entities, 'Normal'\)
    got = \(r['action_type'], r['requires_roll'], r['skill']\) if r else None
    exp = \(exp_type, exp_roll, exp_skill\) if exp_type else None
    status = 'OK  ' if got == exp else 'FAIL'
    if status == 'FAIL':
        all_ok = False
    print\(f'{status}  {text!r}'\)
    if status == 'FAIL':
        print\(f'       expected {exp}'\)
        print\(f'       got      {got}'\)
print\(\)
print\('All OK' if all_ok else 'Some tests FAILED'\)
")

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\Python\\DND-like_RPG" && python -c "
from engine.intent_parser import detect_entity_type, get_entity_base_stats

cases = [
    \('Dragon King',   'attack',        'boss'\),
    \('City Guard',    'direct_action', 'guard'\),
    \('Merchant',      'social',        'merchant'\),
    \('Goblin',        'attack',        'monster'\),
    \('Village Elder', 'social',        'npc'\),
    \('Bandit Chief',  'attack',        'boss'\),
    \('Demon Lord',    'attack',        'boss'\),
    \('哥布林',        'attack',        'monster'\),
    \('村長',          'social',        'npc'\),
    \('守衛',          'direct_action', 'guard'\),
    \('大魔王',        'attack',        'boss'\),
]
all_ok = True
for name, act, exp in cases:
    got = detect_entity_type\(name, act\)
    ok = got == exp
    if not ok: all_ok = False
    print\(f'  {\\"OK  \\" if ok else \\"FAIL\\"}  {name!r} -> {got}'\)
print\(\)
print\('All OK' if all_ok else 'Some FAILED'\)
")

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\user\\Documents\\Python\\DND-like_RPG" && python -c "
from engine.intent_parser import calculate_affinity_delta
from logic.events import EventManager
from ai.llm_client import LLMClient

cases = [
    \('attack',        'CRITICAL SUCCESS', -30\),
    \('attack',        'SUCCESS',          -20\),
    \('attack',        'FAILURE',          -10\),
    \('attack',        'CRITICAL FAILURE',  -5\),
    \('social',        'CRITICAL SUCCESS', +20\),
    \('social',        'SUCCESS',          +10\),
    \('social',        'FAILURE',           -5\),
    \('social',        'CRITICAL FAILURE', -15\),
    \('magic',         'SUCCESS',           +3\),
    \('skill_check',   'SUCCESS',           +3\),
    \('skill_check',   'FAILURE',            0\),
    \('explore',       'SUCCESS',           +1\),
    \('direct_action', 'NO_ROLL',            0\),
    \('unknown',       'NO_ROLL',            0\),  # fallback
]

all_ok = True
for action, outcome, expected in cases:
    got = calculate_affinity_delta\(action, outcome\)
    ok = got == expected
    if not ok: all_ok = False
    print\(f'  {\\"OK  \\" if ok else \\"FAIL\\"}  \({action}, {outcome}\) -> {got:+d}  \(expected {expected:+d}\)'\)

print\(\)
print\('All OK' if all_ok else 'Some FAILED'\)
")
